我幾年前搞大過件事去到校長果度,一開始投訴CATERING COMMITTEE ,HEA鳩我,之後寫晒EMAIL,日日打電話去追,最尾逼佢地炒撚左個仆街藍絲SECURITY

利申:英文廢
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Dear Prof.XXXX

Thank you for your reply, I think this event is settled when I do not see that guard anywhere in the campus.

Yours sincerely
XXXXXX

---- XXXXX提到 ----

Dear XXXXXX,

Your mail dated X XXXX to our President and Deputy President has been passed to me to follow up.

First of all, I wish to apologize for the unpleasant experience you have had when you planned to use our canteen service last XXX XXXX. The tone and manner of the security guard as described in your email is totally unacceptable and I could imagine how bad you would feel during the encounter. While the appointed caterer, Maxim’s Catering Ltd., is responsible for managing the security guards deployed outside the canteen, it has to ensure that a satisfactory level of service is provided by the security guard when enforcing the policy set by the Catering Committee. After the incident, we have asked the caterer to be more mindful about the attitude of the security guards. You may wish to note that the security guard, Mr. Wong, has already been redeployed to another post not within our campus.

I am also sorry to hear(廢話省略)we should also let you know our requirement regarding the level of service provided by the security guards and our following up action about this particular case.

(廢話省略) Please rest assured that we will closely monitor the quality of services provided by our appointed Caterers. If you wish to further discuss the case, please feel free to call me at XXXXXXX.

Best regards,

XXXXX (Chairman, Catering Committee)

---------------------------------------------------
Dear president, deputy president and viewers

I understand that the president ,deputy president and the office are very busy with your works (廢話省略)
At first I state my information and my relation with PolyU:
XXXXXX

(廢話省略)

But what the security said and his manner really got me mad, he said in sequence: "func 咩tion 呀? 你講呀?" , "搏朦呀你?" , "文件呢?" , "唔好扮晒野" in the manner like interrogating a criminal , tones of triad background and nose point raised, then I responded "唔比入都唔洗咁串喎", he then pushed me a little bit with hand and said "行開D啦你阻住人呀" , I was really mad and had some arguments with him, things should have been gone extremely violent if I could not control myself well as he had insulted me verbally and made a physical contact on me. What later he said are : "仲話大學生喎,正一讀屎片" , "我幾廿歲唔撈好閒" , I asked him to show me his security pass for complaint purpose and he said "做咩要比你睇呀?你邊位?" "就係唔比你睇,點呀".

After these, I stepped away and called the catering service committee to send people to deal with my complaint. Sometime later 2 people from the committee and a manager from Maxim talked to me and I told them what happened exactly as above. I emphasized to them that I was not complaining about not being able to gain entry but the behavior of that individual guard, and I request them to seriously deal with that guard who had extremely bad manner in verbal, facial and physical ways, prejudice against university student and young people, and unacceptable altitude towards his job, as far as I can analysis based on what he behaved and said. As the whole thing could be smooth if a guard says "nobody is allowed without approved card or paper according to the rules" in a normal manner without adding so many personal comments and insulting words.

順便問下
有無手足係上星期四既lunch食過舊can既福建炒飯?
果日我同我女朋友每人食左一兜
然後我地兩個都肚痾痾到七彩

During the discussion, staff of the committee at first said that this was not their business since guards are hired by the food company and they are done and let the company to deal with me. I insisted (a few more times) that this event was happened in the campus and they have inevitable responsibilities and I required an official paper response, with the hard work and my serious words ,so that they stayed and got my contact and promised me that they will seriously consider firing this guard or put him somewhere not to face people. Then, the maxim manager said similarly that guards are the business of the security company and as the same I insisted so many times ,then the manager gave me the information of the guard "威信服務有限公司,XXXX, XXXX" promised to deal with him.

Today I received the reply from the catering committee:
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Dear Mr XXXX
(廢話省略)
(廢話省略)
Once again, thank you for bringing to our attention the incident in the afternoon of 5 November 2015.

Regards
XXXXX
Secretary, Catering Committee
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(廢話省略)

I seriously doubt the authority and credibility of this committee and their way of administration, surely I have no right and power to do anything yet as I am just a outsider and nobody, but I have memories and feeling towards PolyU that gave me great education and I met many friends here, and PolyU is becoming a greater university under the leadership, hardwork and passion of the president ,deputy president and others.
I think that a security guard and a committee will represent the whole university to people and contribute to its fame(廢話省略) if there exist such kind of security guard or maybe other staff and the departments/committee are not taking complaints seriously, also I believe in butterfly effect , a little screw can destroy the whole system on failure and corruption always comes from the inside.

I still remember what president Tong said to me in person during (廢話省略)university thanks and treasures alumni and friends outside the school contributing and participating in university's activities, they are always welcomed and hoped that they will continue be in touch with PolyU. I am the XXXX on the left in the photo with president Tong and I treasure this photo and the conversation very much.
(廢話省略)

Yours sincerely

replies.msg:
「全港三罷 追究極權」 大專學界聯合聲明
Joint Statement by Students’ Unions of Higher Institutions
General Strike - Bring the Brutes to Justice, Bring Freedom to Hong Kong

香港人，我們決不能再放任警察濫權濫暴。

大專學界呼籲香港市民即日起無限期三罷，直至濫權濫暴的警員受到法律制裁，港共政權回應香港人五大訴求為止。學界亦呼籲市民響應民間行動，由今天起，每天下午一時到香港國際機場參與集會。

兩個多月以來，警察一直無視法律：使用暴力、施放過期催淚毒氣、毆打無辜市民和記者、拒絕出示委任證、無理拘捕等。

八月十一日晚，全世界目擊香港警察徹底失控，泯滅人性，他們干犯的罪行罊竹難書，例如：

一、 偽裝示威者作出衝擊行為，再配合防暴警察拘捕和平示威者；
二、 以布袋彈射擊市民眼部，令其眼球破裂，造成永久失明；
三、 在港鐵葵芳站施放催淚毒氣；
四、 在港鐵太古站距離僅一米以胡椒球槍掃射站內市民，並於扶手電梯推倒和毆打市民以致人踩人；
五、 偽造證據，插贓嫁禍，將棍棒塞進被捕人士的背包；
六、 對北角、荃灣的白衣暴徒視而不見，任由暴徒無差别攻擊市民及記者；
七、 香港警察以去人性化詞語「蟑螂」貶稱香港市民，與盧旺達大屠殺鼓吹胡圖族優等論及納粹軍貶稱猶太人為「老鼠」如出一徹，以圖合理化自身濫權濫暴之惡行；


香港已經進入軍管時代。

法治的核心在於沒有任何人能夠凌駕法律。港共政權連月來不斷譴責示威者破壞法治，但警察可濫權濫暴而不受法律制裁才是使法治崩壞的元兇。

我們絕不可以向暴政低頭。天祐香港，暴政必亡。

香港演藝學院學生會

二零一九年八月十二日
